result.stdout:
Unified host for lxmonika
Copyright (C) 2024-2026 Trung Nguyen

Usage: monika [command] [options]

Options:
  --help  Display this help.
  --info  Display lxmonika information.

Commands:
  exec <Arguments>      Execute a Pico process using a lxmonika provider.
  install <DriverPath>  Install lxmonika or a provider.
  uninstall             Uninstall lxmonika or a provider.
Run 'monika [command] --help' for more information on a command.

Unified host for lxmonika
Copyright (C) 2024-2026 Trung Nguyen

Usage: monika [command] [options]

Options:
  --help  Display this help.
  --info  Display lxmonika information.

Commands:
  exec <Arguments>      Execute a Pico process using a lxmonika provider.
  install <DriverPath>  Install lxmonika or a provider.
  uninstall             Uninstall lxmonika or a provider.
Run 'monika [command] --help' for more information on a command.

result.stdout:
Execute a Pico process using a lxmonika provider.

Usage: monika exec [options] <Arguments>

Arguments:
  <Arguments>  The command to be executed by the provider.

Options:
  --help           Display this help.
  --provider       The name of the provider as registered by the driver. If not specified, the command will use the first available provider.
  --provider-args  The arguments to be passed to the provider.
  --root           The file or directory to be used as the root for the new process. If not specified, the command will use the current working directory.
  --cd             The current directory for the new process.
  --               Pass the remaining command line as-is to the new process.

commands.payload:
Execute a Pico process using a lxmonika provider.

Usage: monika exec [options] <Arguments>

Arguments:
  <Arguments>  The command to be executed by the provider.

Options:
  --help           Display this help.
  --provider       The name of the provider as registered by the driver. If not specified, the command will use the first available provider.
  --provider-args  The arguments to be passed to the provider.
  --root           The file or directory to be used as the root for the new process. If not specified, the command will use the current working directory.
  --cd             The current directory for the new process.
  --               Pass the remaining command line as-is to the new process.

result.stdout:
Install lxmonika or a provider.

Usage: monika install [command] [options] <DriverPath>

Arguments:
  <DriverPath>  A path to lxmonika. If not specified, the command will look for 'lxmonika.sys' at the executable file's location.

Options:
  --help                      Display this help.
  --core                      A path to 'lxcore.sys'. If not specified, the command will search the executable file's location.
  --borrow                    The name of a core service for lxmonika to borrow. If not specified, the command will search a known list of core services.
  --enable-late-registration  Enable lxmonika late registration using legacy heuristics.
  --force                     Bypass system checks while installing lxmonika.

Commands:
  provider <DriverPath>  Install a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

commands.payload:
Install lxmonika or a provider.

Usage: monika install [command] [options] <DriverPath>

Arguments:
  <DriverPath>  A path to lxmonika. If not specified, the command will look for 'lxmonika.sys' at the executable file's location.

Options:
  --help                      Display this help.
  --core                      A path to 'lxcore.sys'. If not specified, the command will search the executable file's location.
  --borrow                    The name of a core service for lxmonika to borrow. If not specified, the command will search a known list of core services.
  --enable-late-registration  Enable lxmonika late registration using legacy heuristics.
  --force                     Bypass system checks while installing lxmonika.

Commands:
  provider <DriverPath>  Install a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

result.stdout:
Install a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

Usage: monika install provider [options] <DriverPath>

Arguments:
  <DriverPath>  A path to the provider to be installed.

Options:
  --help          Display this help.
  --name          The name of the provider service. If not specified, the command will use the driver file name without extension.
  --display-name  The optional display name of the provider service.

  --display-name  The optional display name of the provider service.

result.stdout:
Uninstall lxmonika or a provider.

Usage: monika uninstall [command] [options]

Options:
  --help  Display this help.

Commands:
  provider <ServiceName>  Uninstall a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

commands.payload:
Uninstall lxmonika or a provider.

Usage: monika uninstall [command] [options]

Options:
  --help  Display this help.

Commands:
  provider <ServiceName>  Uninstall a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

result.stdout:
Uninstall a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

Usage: monika uninstall provider [options] <ServiceName>

Arguments:
  <ServiceName>  The name of the provider service to be uninstalled. Must match the one registered during installation.

Options:
  --help  Display this help.

commands.payload:
Uninstall a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

Usage: monika uninstall provider [options] <ServiceName>

Arguments:
  <ServiceName>  The name of the provider service to be uninstalled. Must match the one registered during installation.

Options:
  --help  Display this help.
